description: a jovial heavyset older woman with rosy cheeks, laugh lines and a big warm grin, curly greying hair, plump build, wearing only plain underclothes (a plain sleeveless undershirt and simple shorts), barefoot, neutral undressed base body ready to be dressed, detailed RPG pixel art inspired by Grave Seasons, realistic human proportions and expressive faces, naturalistic lighting and a varied lifelike color palette, soft dramatic shading, high detail, clean readable shapes; mature art for a teen-and-up audience, never childish or cutesy but not forced to be dark
look: a jovial heavyset older woman with rosy cheeks, laugh lines and a big warm grin, curly greying hair, plump build
